description: A lab analyzer has finished processing a batch of samples. A technician needs to review and release the results into the LIS.

nodes.task_description: Review the results from the analyzer interface, which have been transmitted to the LIS.

expected_outcome.value: Technician views the batch of results pending verification.

nodes.task_description: Check the quality control results for the batch to ensure they are within acceptable limits.

expected_outcome.value: Technician confirms the QC was successful, validating the patient results.

nodes.task_description: Verify and release the patient results. Any critical values are automatically flagged.

expected_outcome.value: The results are finalized in the LIS and transmitted to the main EHR for the provider to review.
